sourceMovie.title: Risky Business
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Risky Business works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Coyote Ugly
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Risky Business clicked for you, Coyote Ugly (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Risky Business?
faq.answer: Try Coyote Ugly, Drive Me Crazy, The Wackness—each shares DNA with Risky Business while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Risky Business?
faq.answer: Risky Business (1983) is best described as Romance, Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Risky Business worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
